focus: Validate the GEN-022 BGE vector/hybrid winner in a separate remote OpenSearch kNN candidate index.
reason_started: GEN-022 showed BGE hybrid retrieval beat refined PRF offline, but promotion-quality evidence required remote OpenSearch vector/hybrid validation.
reason_ended: Remote OpenSearch BGE hybrid reproduced the graded offline gain and slightly improved binary k=20, while leaving the public/default architecture unchanged.

validators_executed.name: npm run opensearch:health
validators_executed.evidence: Remote OpenSearch 3.3.2 cluster was green before index load.

validators_executed.name: npm run load:cranfield:bge
validators_executed.evidence: Created and loaded cranfield-v0-bge-base-en-v15-gen023 with 1,400 documents and 768-dimensional BGE vectors.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield:opensearch-vector
validators_executed.evidence: Remote BGE hybrid reached graded nDCG@10 0.3533 and binary nDCG@20 0.4926.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: Node tests, MDE parser, traceability validation through GEN-023, fixture index check, and fixture evaluation passed. Final run is recorded in VAL-033.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-023 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

validators_skipped.name: Phase 2 transferability validation
validators_skipped.reason: Out of scope for this project-local Cranfield validation turn.

evidence_quality_notes: Remote OpenSearch kNN reproduces the graded offline BGE hybrid result.
Remote binary k=20 slightly improves the offline BGE hybrid result.
The separate candidate index did not change the public/default cranfield-v0 index or deployed Worker.
Transferability and runtime cost/latency remain required before public/default promotion.
